expectations.text: Avoids giving a one-line algorithm swap as the whole answer
expectations.evidence: The response does not reduce the answer to a one-line algorithm replacement and instead explains several incremental strategy changes.

expectations.text: Explains spill decisions in terms of cost model, loop depth, or measurement tradeoffs
expectations.evidence: It explicitly discusses spill cost, loop depth, block frequency, rematerialization, and measurement tradeoffs.

expectations.text: Requests or recommends comparative performance measurement
expectations.evidence: It asks for runtime, dynamic load/store count, move count, compile time, and baseline numbers.
